libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Ensure the generated test build passes native runtime system properties for 5.0.1/Vert.x 5.0.x Netty 4.2.x native runs: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. Tests can be self-contained by starting an in-process Vert.x HttpServer on localhost and exercising WebClient against it; no external HTTP service is needed.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The vertx-web-client artifact contains OAuth2WebClient classes, but vertx-auth-oauth2 is optional and not resolved by default; avoid OAuth2-specific tests unless intentionally adding that optional dependency.
Local Gradle/native-image verification remains authoritative; the observed need is inferred from resolved Netty 4.2.2.Final and the existing 5.0.0 nativeTest runtime-args workaround.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Vert.x Web Client 5.0.1 still resolves Vert.x Core 5.0.1 with Netty 4.2.2.Final, so the existing Java 25 native-run unsafe-access setup used for 5.0.0 appears to remain necessary for 5.0.1. No extra Maven dependency or Docker service is required for meaningful core WebClient coverage.
